song.title: All Priase to Our Redeeming Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) All praise to our redeeming Lord, Who joins us by His grace, And bids us, each to each restored, Together seek His face, Together seek His face.
[V2] 2) He bids us build each other up; And, gathered into one, To our high calling’s glorious hope, We hand in hand go on, We hand in hand go on.
[V3] 3) The gift which He on one bestows, We all delight to prove; The grace through every vessel flows In purest streams of love, In purest streams of love.
[V4] 4) We all partake the joy of one; The common peace we feel; A peace to worldly minds unknown, A joy unspeakable, A joy unspeakable.
[V5] 5) And if our fellowship below In Jesus be so sweet, What height of rapture shall we know, When ’round His throne we meet! When ’round His throne we meet!
song.author: Charles Wesley
